description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named bins that runs on push to the master branch, excluding the docs directory, and can be called by another workflow with optional inputs for lnav version number and upload URL. In an ubuntu-latest job running in a tstack/lnav-build:1 container, check out the code, run the entrypoint script, and build a musl package if a version number is provided. Upload a build artifact and a musl-binary archive to a release if an upload URL is provided.
